rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by using only visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not introduce new declarations or architecture.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions: Boolean variables must be assigned Boolean expressions, numeric variables numeric expressions.
Do not place implementation-level bindings or subcomponent paths in component type annexes; move valid assignments to implementation scope.
When AGREE diagnostics report '<error>' types or 'named thing must be an expression with a type', trace and resolve the first unresolved identifier on the same line.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible identifiers from the current scope; avoid package-qualified names unless explicitly imported.
Generated AGREE expressions should preserve type correctness: numeric, boolean, and real types must align with their declarations and usage.
Component type contracts should only reference visible ports and features; implementation-specific details belong in implementation annexes.
Validator diagnostics pointing to unresolved identifiers or type mismatches should be resolved by correcting or removing the invalid AGREE clause.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and must be placed in valid component type or implementation scopes.
Use only declared constants, variables, or helper functions in AGREE expressions; avoid undefined or unqualified references.
Assignments in implementation scope must target valid output features or declared auxiliary variables.
Boolean expressions in AGREE must evaluate to bool type; numeric expressions to int or real type.
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to fix unresolved references by adding new declarations or architecture elements; instead, remove or rewrite the clause.
Avoid placing implementation-level guarantees or assignments in component type annexes; they must be in the correct scope.
Do not assume that missing identifiers can be resolved by inventing new ones; always use visible identifiers from the model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement in component types vs. implementations
